full_text:
Zhuge Shang 諸葛尚
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhuge Shang (諸葛尚). Died with his father on the battlefield against Deng Ai at only nineteen years old. Zhuge Shang was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Zhuge Shang lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
